Ad Text:
SCC (Suncorp Control Centre) Solution Lead

Consumer Insurance – Disaster Management
Location - Disaster Management Centre of Excellence, Brisbane
12-Month Fixed Term Contract

Make a real impact when it matters most.

We’re seeking an experienced SCC Solution Lead to join our Disaster Management Centre of Excellence on a 12-month fixed term contract. This role sits within Consumer Insurance – Disaster Management and plays a critical part in strengthening disaster response capability through technology, data and innovation.

If you’re passionate about product ownership, digital platforms, and delivering outcomes that support communities during severe events, this is a unique opportunity to make a meaningful difference.

About the Role

As the SCC Solution Lead, you will have end-to-end ownership of the SCC Web App, driving the delivery of monthly enhancements and strategic initiatives that improve disaster preparedness, response and recovery.

You’ll partner closely with operational, technology and business stakeholders to capture and prioritise requirements, manage the product backlog, and translate complex needs into scalable, customer-focused solutions. The role is central to the success of the Control Centre and Disaster Response Centre (DRC), supporting improved situational awareness, operational visibility and decision-making.

This role also directly contributes to Clause 7.3 of the Queensland Commitment Charter, supporting the ongoing development and deployment of the SCC platform to better monitor severe weather, communicate with impacted communities, and leverage AI and data insights before, during and after disaster events.

Key Responsibilities

Own and evolve the SCC Web App product vision and roadmap, aligned to operational priorities and disaster management objectives
Deliver monthly enhancements and strategic initiatives, maximising product value
Balance short-term operational needs with long-term platform scalability and sustainability
Leverage AI and advanced analytics to enhance situational awareness and decision support
Lead discovery workshops and stakeholder interviews to define outcomes and user needs
Manage end-to-end delivery, including governance, stakeholder engagement, testing (UAT/PVT) and release activities
Drive continuous improvement using user feedback, usage data and operational insights
Promote data-led decision making across the SCC
Champion improvements that strengthen disaster response capability and operational resilience
Ensure readiness of onboarding materials, user guidance and feature launch support

About You:

Tertiary qualification in Business, Commerce, Technology or a related discipline (mandatory)
Agile / Product certifications such as CSPO, PSPO, SAFe POPM or similar (desirable)
5+ years’ experience in product ownership or similar roles delivering digital platforms or complex web applications
Proven experience working in complex, cross-functional enterprise environments
Strong stakeholder engagement, facilitation and influencing skills, including senior leaders
Demonstrated ability to translate complex business and operational needs into clear, outcome-focused requirements
Experience working in Agile, hybrid or scaled delivery models (Scrum, Kanban, SAFe)
Strong planning, prioritisation and problem-solving capability
A strong customer focus with a track record of delivering measurable business value
Change management experience and comfort operating in evolving environments
Exposure to disaster management, insurance, risk or geospatial data environments is highly regarded

Key Capabilities

Advanced business and commercial acumen
Strong technical literacy and comfort working with digital platforms and data-driven solutions
High data literacy and analytical thinking capability
Clear, adaptable communication skills
Strong time management and autonomy
Collaborative, relationship-focused working style
Confident negotiation and influencing skills
Adaptability in a fast-paced, high-impact environment

What we can offer you:

Discounts and offers on a range of insurance products
A range of flexible working and leave options
Invest in your brighter future with ongoing study support and career development programs.
Give back to our communities with payroll giving, donation matching and paid volunteer leave.
Prioritise your work/life balance with our robust employee assistance program and dedicated employee council.

Employee benefits | Suncorp Group

At Suncorp we believe we are our best when our workforce is as diverse, talented and passionate as the communities in which we live and operate, and where our people feel included, valued and connected. We are passionate about inspiring our people by creating a diverse, accessible, and inclusive culture, offering flexible work, career development and internal mobility, and building connected relationships amongst our team members and with our customers.
